---
title: "Education"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Education
</h2>

<div style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>University of Nebraska–Lincoln</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Aug 2023 – Present</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">Ph.D. in Agricultural Economics</div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>University of São Paulo</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Feb 2018 – Sept 2023</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">Ph.D. in Applied Economics</div>
    <div style="color:#6B7280; font-size:0.9rem;">
      Academic visit: University of Nebraska–Lincoln (2021–2022)
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>Pecege Institute (University of São Paulo)</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Jun 2022 – Aug 2024</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">MBA in Data Science and Analytics</div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>Pecege Institute (University of São Paulo)</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Jun 2019 – Aug 2021</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">MBA in Agribusiness</div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>Federal University of Viçosa</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Aug 2015 – Dec 2017</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">M.Sc. in Economics</div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-bottom:1.2rem;">
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <strong>Federal University of Viçosa</strong>
      <span style="color:#6B7280;">Mar 2011 – Jul 2015</span>
    </div>
    <div style="color:#374151;">B.A. in Economics</div>
    <div style="color:#6B7280; font-size:0.9rem;">
      Exchange program: University of Lleida, Spain (Fall 2014)
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<h2 style="color:#050505; font-size:1.4rem; font-weight:700;
           border-bottom:2px solid #050505;
           padding-bottom:0.15rem;
           margin-bottom:0.8rem;">
Scholarships, Honors, and Awards
</h2>

<div style="margin:0; line-height:1.8;">

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>Robert Sather Memorial Scholarship</span>
    <span style="color:#6B7280;">2026</span>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>Larrick Student Travel Award</span>
    <span style="color:#6B7280;">2024</span>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>CAPES PrInt: Program for Institutional Internationalization</span>
    <span style="color:#6B7280;">2021</span>
  </div>

  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between;">
    <span>Santander Ibero-American Scholarship</span>
    <span style="color:#6B7280;">2015</span>
  </div>

</div>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
